name: Crab-Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tops off of the tomatoes and scoop out the seeds.
2. Mix together cooked crab meat, chopped onion, minced garlic, diced bell pepper, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
3. Stuff each tomato with the crab mixture.
4. Place the stuffed tomatoes in a baking dish and bake at 375°F for 20-25 minutes or until heated through.
